MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: D. Hakewill; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff San Francisco Housing Authority is present. Attorney Tony Ruch appearing for the plaintiff. Represented by Tim Barrow.
Defendant Clarence Thomas is present.
Attorney Stephen E. Moyer representing the defendant through limited scope.

The settlement attorney Mark Schreiber, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 501A, for settlement discussions.

This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed. The trial date of NOV-14-2011 is vacated.
